name: SUMMER VACATION
short_description: Head down to a tropical island paradise for a VR summer filled with a beach-load of fun activities, and a delightfully whimsical story about friendship.
detailed_description:
Summer! Beach! VR!!!


Summer's here, and it's hot, hot, HOT!
Phew, it's SO hot, a vacation at a tropical beach resort would really hit the spot!
...That's not a bad idea! So, how about embarking on a VR trip to the sea and the sand.

■Try a Beach-Load of Activities!
Whack watermelons, fling frisbees, vibe with volleyball, fish for fishies, double-up on drinks...this VR beach resort is filled with stuff to do!

■Post-Game Content
The story's great and all, but what happens after the tale is told? Why, our free mode and customizing heroine costume! Create the perfect situations for you, then play the game again to experience your ultimate dream vacation!

■Story Summary
Ahh, another boring ol' summer vacation, same as last year, which was the same as the year before...
...Or so it seemed, until you were hired on as our heroic heroine's private tutor for the summer and flown off for a wild working vacation on a tropical island paradise. But, uh-oh! Your pupil is no honor student, and she's always skipping class to skip-a-dee-doo-dah across the beach. Oh, woe! Oh, the humanity! Tutoring is your passion, and yet you are stymied at every turn! But soon, your resolve begins to break, and reluctantly—so reluctantly—you begin to join your capricious pupil for fun times at the beach.

■ DLC

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
